title: Shin kurama tengu
writer: Shôzaburô Asai, Jirô Osaragi, Junzô Sagara
actors: Raizô Ichikawa, Tamao Nakamura, Jun Fujimaki
plot: The film is set in Kyoto at the end of the Tokugawa period, when there is a fierce clash between the supporters of the Emperor, who are fighting for the overthrow of the Shogunate, and the Shinsengumi squad, who are chasing them.
